'''鈭歸-dh-f''' ('''kawadhaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:charpit|charpit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:charpit|charpit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-dh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kawadhaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwadhaf|thiwadhaf]] || [[word:jiwadhaf|jiwadhaf]] || [[word:shiwadhaf|shiwadhaf]] || [[word:kiwadhaf|kiwadhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwadhaf|thuthuwadhaf]] || [[word:jujuwadhaf|jujuwadhaf]] || [[word:shushuwadhaf|shushuwadhaf]] || [[word:kukuwadhaf|kukuwadhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwadhaf|thuwadhaf]] || [[word:juwadhaf|juwadhaf]] || [[word:shuwadhaf|shuwadhaf]] || [[word:kuwadhaf|kuwadhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwadhaf|thuwadhaf]] || [[word:juwadhaf|juwadhaf]] || [[word:shuwadhaf|shuwadhaf]] || [[word:kuwadhaf|kuwadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewadhaf|thewadhaf]] || [[word:jewadhaf|jewadhaf]] || [[word:shewadhaf|shewadhaf]] || [[word:kewadhaf|kewadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowadhaf|thothowadhaf]] || [[word:jojowadhaf|jojowadhaf]] || [[word:shoshowadhaf|shoshowadhaf]] || [[word:kokowadhaf|kokowadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowadhaf|thowadhaf]] || [[word:jowadhaf|jowadhaf]] || [[word:showadhaf|showadhaf]] || [[word:kowadhaf|kowadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadhaf|thowadhaf]] || [[word:jowadhaf|jowadhaf]] || [[word:showadhaf|showadhaf]] || [[word:kowadhaf|kowadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wadhaf|th忙wadhaf]] || [[word:j忙wadhaf|j忙wadhaf]] || [[word:sh忙wadhaf|sh忙wadhaf]] || [[word:k忙wadhaf|k忙wadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawadhaf|thathawadhaf]] || [[word:jajawadhaf|jajawadhaf]] || [[word:shashawadhaf|shashawadhaf]] || [[word:kakawadhaf|kakawadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawadhaf|thawadhaf]] || [[word:jawadhaf|jawadhaf]] || [[word:shawadhaf|shawadhaf]] || [[word:kawadhaf|kawadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawadhaf|thawadhaf]] || [[word:jawadhaf|jawadhaf]] || [[word:shawadhaf|shawadhaf]] || [[word:kawadhaf|kawadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawadhaf|shawadhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawadhaf|goshawadhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawadhaf|gokishawadhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawadhafn眉|shawadhafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkn眉|goshawadhafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhafn眉|gokishawadhafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawadhafsh毛|shawadhafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawadhafnksh毛|goshawadhafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawadhafsh毛|gokishawadhafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhafro|shawadhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkro|goshawadhafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhafro|gokishawadhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhafmu|shawadhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkmu|goshawadhafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhafmu|gokishawadhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawadhafsher|shawadhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawadhafnksher|goshawadhafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawadhafsher|gokishawadhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawadhafng|shawadhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkng|goshawadhafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawadhafng|gokishawadhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawadhafya|shawadhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkya|goshawadhafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawadhafya|gokishawadhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawadhafyam|shawadhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkyam|goshawadhafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawadhafyam|gokishawadhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhafn眉sh毛|shawadhafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkn眉sh毛|goshawadhafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhafn眉sh毛|gokishawadhafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhafn眉ro|shawadhafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkn眉ro|goshawadhafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhafn眉ro|gokishawadhafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhafn眉mu|shawadhafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkn眉mu|goshawadhafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhafn眉mu|gokishawadhafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhafsh毛n眉|shawadhafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhafnksh毛n眉|goshawadhafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhafsh毛n眉|gokishawadhafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhafsh毛ro|shawadhafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhafnksh毛ro|goshawadhafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhafsh毛ro|gokishawadhafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhafsh毛mu|shawadhafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhafnksh毛mu|goshawadhafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhafsh毛mu|gokishawadhafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhafron眉|shawadhafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkron眉|goshawadhafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhafron眉|gokishawadhafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhafrosh毛|shawadhafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkrosh毛|goshawadhafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhafrosh毛|gokishawadhafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhafromu|shawadhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkromu|goshawadhafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhafromu|gokishawadhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhafmun眉|shawadhafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkmun眉|goshawadhafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhafmun眉|gokishawadhafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhafmush毛|shawadhafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkmush毛|goshawadhafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhafmush毛|gokishawadhafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhafmuro|shawadhafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhafnkmuro|goshawadhafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhafmuro|gokishawadhafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
